name: Soup Time Cat Creamy Treats Tuna & Crab 70g
description: Soup Time Creamy is a healthy and hydrating lickable treat made with premium tuna and crab. This natural, tasty snack is packed with essential nutrients to keep your cat happy and healthy. Serve it as a treat, reward, or a delicious topping on dry food to add variety to their diet. Ingredients: Tuna, Crab, Chicken, Starch, Taurine, Vitamins (A, B2, B3, B5, D3, E), Xanthan Gum. Guaranteed Analysis: Crude Protein: 6.5% (min) Crude Fat: 0.1% (min) Crude Fiber: 1.0% (min) Crude Ash: 2.0% (max) Moisture: 90.0% (max) Serving Suggestions: Serve directly from the tube as a bonding treat Pour onto a dish for a quick snack Use as a flavorful topper to encourage picky eaters
